emails.subject: Good Job
emails.body: Good Job Scott, Just a quick note. I believe you did a great job this afternoon in communicating with your group about Enron's "cluster." Today I have found this overwhelming since of Pride for this company and I don't want it to fail. So if there is ANYTHING I can do to help please let me know. I am in for the challenge and the long haul. Sincerely, Sandra

emails.subject: Good Job

emails.subject: RE: Good Job
emails.body: RE: Good Job Thank you for your kind words. As always, I appreciate your efforts and integrity. I am also very proud of what we have accomplished here and am hopeful that we will look back on this and smile about how we came through it. Scott
